{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dornoth Two
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|There is a storm on [[Dornoth Two]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth]] II is a location or colony.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
